description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a surrounding fence and a driveway leading to the front entrance. The house features a prominent covered front porch supported by columns, and a gable roof with a dark finish. The exterior walls are a light beige color, contrasting with the darker roof and trim. Windows are arranged symmetrically on the front facade, with additional windows visible on the sides, providing ample natural light. The fenced yard encloses the house, and the driveway connects to a road at the front of the property. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, covered front porch, and fenced yard, set on a rectangular plot with a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, side windows, and the fenced yard extending along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, rear windows, and the continuation of the fence around the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, additional windows, and the driveway connecting to the road.
